query: SELECT SUM(realizedPnl) as totalRealizedPnl, COUNT(*) as totalTrades, SUM(CASE WHEN realizedPnl > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wins, SUM(CASE WHEN realizedPnl < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as losses FROM paperTrades WHERE sessionId = 25;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT SUM(realizedPnl) as totalRealizedPnl, COUNT(*) as totalTrades, SUM(CASE WHEN realizedPnl > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wins, SUM(CASE WHEN realizedPnl < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as losses FROM paperTrades WHERE sessionId = 25;
